stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes what is the minimum take-off fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight with a turbine engine jet aircraft? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Trip fuel: 7200 kg
Alternate fuel: 4440 kg
Destination holding fuel: 6450 kg/h
Alternate holding fuel: 6000 kg/h
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
